feeds.title: All About Android (Audio)
feeds.description: All About Android delivers everything you want to know about Android each week--the biggest news, freshest hardware, best apps and geekiest how-tos--with Android enthusiasts Jason Howell, Florence Ion, Ron Richards, and a variety of special guests along the way. Records live every Tuesday at 8:00pm Eastern / 5:00pm Pacific / 00:00 (Wed) UTC.

feeds.title: Android
feeds.description: Android news, reviews, tips, and discussions about rooting, tutorials, and apps. Generic discussion about phones/tablets is allowed, but technical-support, upgrade related questions or buy/sell posts, app recommendations and carrier-related issues should be asked in their respective subreddits!

feeds.title: Android Authority Podcast
feeds.description: The Android Authority Podcast discusses Android every week, bringing the latest stories and features from the mobile ecosystem. Check out androidauthority.com for the latest news and reviews, then join the community forums and YouTube channel for more.
